response.justification: The role requires 8 years of C++ experience as a core qualification, but the candidate has only about 6 months of C/C++ work at National Instruments back in 2014-2015. Their career is built around TypeScript/JavaScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed systems leadership at the scale this role demands. While they have solid engineering craftsmanship and some distributed-systems exposure at Sociomantic, the gap against the mandatory C++ requirement is too large to justify an interview for a Technical Lead position.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops)
Some distributed systems exposure handling high-throughput services at Sociomantic
Long track record of technical ownership and founding/leading open source projects
concerns: Effectively no C++ experience versus the 8-year minimum requirement
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure leadership
No formal tech-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform background
